subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, through Whom the heaven of grace is upraised, and the clouds of generosity pour forth their gifts and bestowals, and the sun of divine bounty shineth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله سماء فضل مرتفع و سحاب کرم در بخشش و عطا و آفتاب جود رحمانی از افق
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God sanctified from time and place, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Word of God the cause of creation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
